description: Elevator inspection management system — mobile field app, admin portal, customer portal, and landing page in a pnpm monorepo with TanStack Start, Convex, Clerk, and Cloudflare Workers

userStories.title: Initialize pnpm monorepo with Turborepo
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the root monorepo structure so that all apps and packages can be managed together.
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json with pnpm workspaces configured
pnpm-workspace.yaml listing apps/* and packages/*
turbo.json with build/dev/lint pipelines
.gitignore with node_modules, dist, .turbo, .vinxi, .output
All packages at latest stable versions — verify each before installing
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the foundation. Keep it minimal — just root configs, no apps or packages yet.

userStories.title: Scaffold TanStack Start apps (admin, client, landing)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the three TanStack Start applications scaffolded so that each can be developed independently.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/admin/ — TanStack Start app (React 19 + Vite + Nitro targeting Cloudflare Workers)
apps/client/ — TanStack Start app (same stack)
apps/landing/ — TanStack Start app (same stack)
Each app has wrangler.toml for Cloudflare Workers
Each app has its own package.json with correct dependencies
All packages at latest stable versions — verify with npm info before installing
pnpm dev starts all three apps concurrently
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use TanStack Start latest with Nitro adapter for Cloudflare Workers. Verify latest versions via context7 MCP or npm info.

userStories.title: Create packages/ui with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS v4
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared UI package so that all apps use consistent components.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/ui/ with package.json, tsconfig.json
Tailwind CSS v4 setup (CSS-based configuration, NOT tailwind.config.js)
shadcn/ui initialized with Button, Input, Card components as starting point
Shared package importable from all three apps
All packages at latest stable versions
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based config (@theme, @import), NOT JS config files. Check latest docs.

userStories.title: Create stub packages (types, auth, utils, email)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared package stubs so that cross-app code can be organized.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/types/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, index.ts stub
packages/auth/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, index.ts stub
packages/utils/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, index.ts stub
packages/email/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, index.ts stub
All packages importable from apps
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Just stubs with basic exports. Real implementation comes in later stories.

userStories.title: Set up Convex with schema stub and dev server
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Convex configured so that the backend is ready for schema and function development.
acceptanceCriteria: convex/ directory at elevatorbud root with schema.ts stub (empty schema)
convex.json or convex config pointing to the convex/ directory
Convex dev dependency installed at latest version
pnpm dev starts Convex dev server alongside the apps
pnpm build succeeds across the entire monorepo
Typecheck passes across the entire monorepo
userStories.notes: Verify Convex latest version. The convex/ directory lives at elevatorbud root, not inside an app.

userStories.title: Define Convex schema for all tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema defined so that all tables and indexes are ready for use.
acceptanceCriteria: convex/schema.ts defines hissar table with all fields (identification, technical spec, inspection, modernization, emergency phone, metadata)
organisationer table: id, namn, organisationsnummer, kontaktperson, telefonnummer, email
anvandare table: clerk_user_id, email, namn, roll ('admin' | 'kund'), organisation_id (nullable), aktiv, skapad_datum, senaste_login
forslagsvarden table: kategori, varde, aktiv, skapad_datum
Indexes: hissar by organisation_id, by hissnummer; anvandare by clerk_user_id; forslagsvarden by kategori
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The hissar table is large — all fields from the PRD data model. Include status field with 'aktiv' | 'rivd' | 'arkiverad'.

userStories.title: Create Convex auth helpers and Clerk webhook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auth helpers and a Clerk webhook so that user authentication and sync work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: convex/auth.ts exports getCurrentUser(ctx), requireAdmin(ctx), requireTenantAccess(ctx, organisationId)
getCurrentUser returns the anvandare document for the authenticated Clerk user
requireAdmin throws if user is not admin role
requireTenantAccess throws if user doesn't have access to the given organization
Clerk webhook HTTP action handles user.created, user.updated, user.deleted events
Webhook syncs changes to anvandare table
Follow official docs: https://docs.convex.dev/auth/clerk
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read Clerk + Convex integration docs via context7 MCP before implementing.

userStories.title: Set up packages/auth with ConvexProviderWithClerk
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the auth package configured so that apps can use Clerk + Convex authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/auth/ exports ConvexProviderWithClerk wrapper component
Clerk client setup compatible with TanStack Start
Follow https://clerk.com/docs/tanstack-react-start/getting-started/quickstart
Follow https://clerk.com/docs/guides/development/integrations/databases/convex
Provider component usable in both admin and client apps
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Fetch and follow official Clerk + TanStack Start docs. Do NOT rely on training data for API shape.

userStories.title: Add Clerk login pages to admin and client apps
userStories.description: As a user, I need login pages so that I can authenticate and access the system with my assigned role.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin app: login page using Clerk <SignIn /> component, only admin role users can access app routes
Client app: login page using Clerk <SignIn />, only kund role users can access app routes
Unauthenticated users redirected to login page
After login, user role and organisation_id available via Convex getCurrentUser()
Session persists across page reloads (Clerk JWT)
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin desktop sidebar layout with org selector
userStories.description: As an admin on desktop, I need a sidebar navigation layout so that I can access all features.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop layout with sidebar: Dashboard, Register, Modernisering, Underhall, Admin section (Organisationer, Anvandare, Import, Referensdata)
Organisation selector dropdown in header (filter all views by selected org, or 'Alla')
Responsive: sidebar collapses on smaller screens
Logo and 'Hisskompetens' branding in header
Active page highlighted in sidebar
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Mobile users see the field app (daily overview) instead of sidebar layout.

userStories.title: Client app sidebar layout with route protection
userStories.description: As a customer, I need a clean portal layout so that I can access my organization's elevator data.
acceptanceCriteria: Client app layout with sidebar: Dashboard, Register, Modernisering, Underhall
Organization name displayed as static text in header (no dropdown — customers see only their own org)
No admin routes, no edit buttons, no user management in client app
If a customer tries to access admin app, access denied at login
Unauthenticated users redirected to Clerk login
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convex mutations and queries for organisationer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend functions for organization management.
acceptanceCriteria: Convex mutation organisationer.create (namn, organisationsnummer, kontaktperson, telefonnummer, email)
Convex mutation organisationer.update
Convex query organisationer.list (returns all orgs with elevator count)
Convex query organisationer.get (single org by id)
All functions require admin role via requireAdmin(ctx)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin page for organization management
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to create and manage customer organizations from a dedicated page.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin app page /admin/organisationer with TanStack Table listing all organizations
Table columns: namn, organisationsnummer, kontaktperson, email, antal hissar
'Create organization' form using TanStack Form (namn required, organisationsnummer format check)
Click on organization opens edit view
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convex actions and queries for anvandare with Clerk sync
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend functions for user management that sync with Clerk.
acceptanceCriteria: Convex action anvandare.create: creates user in Clerk API + creates anvandare document with roll and organisation_id
Convex action anvandare.update: updates name, email, roll, organisation — syncs to Clerk metadata
Convex action anvandare.inaktivera: blocks user in Clerk + sets aktiv=false
Convex action anvandare.remove: deletes from Clerk + Convex, historical references set to 'Borttagen anvandare'
Convex queries: anvandare.list (filterable by roll, organisation), anvandare.get, anvandare.listByOrganisation
All functions require admin role
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Clerk sends invitation email — user sets password via Clerk UI.

userStories.title: Admin page for user management
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to manage user accounts from a dedicated page.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin app page /admin/anvandare with TanStack Table (namn, email, roll, organisation, status, senaste inloggning)
Filter by roll and organisation, search by name/email
'Create user' form with TanStack Form: namn, email, roll (admin/kund), organisation (required if kund)
Quick-action from organization view: add customer user directly
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convex functions for forslagsvarden (suggestion values)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend functions for managing reference data used in combobox fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Convex query forslagsvarden.list: returns values filtered by kategori
Convex mutation forslagsvarden.create (kategori, varde)
Convex mutation forslagsvarden.update: rename value — updates all elevators with old value
Convex mutation forslagsvarden.merge: merge duplicate values
Convex mutation forslagsvarden.deactivate: mark inactive (no longer suggested, existing data preserved)
Mutations require admin role; query accessible to all authenticated users
Categories: hisstyp, fabrikat, distrikt, skotselforetag, besiktningsorgan, hissbeteckning, typ_dorrar, kollektiv, drivsystem, maskinplacering, atgarder_vid_modernisering
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin page for reference data management
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to manage suggestion values used in combobox fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin app page /admin/referensdata showing all categories with their values
Rename a value (propagates to all elevators via forslagsvarden.update)
Merge duplicate values
Deactivate a value
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convex mutation hissar.create with all fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the backend mutation for creating elevator records.
acceptanceCriteria: Convex mutation hissar.create accepts all fields from the schema
Requires admin role via requireAdmin(ctx)
Auto-sets skapad_av (current user) and skapad_datum (now)
Auto-sets status to 'aktiv'
Validates hissnummer is unique
New category values auto-added to forslagsvarden table
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Combobox component with suggestion values and free text
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable combobox that filters suggestions and allows free text entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared combobox component in packages/ui/
Filters existing suggestion values from forslagsvarden as user types
Allows free text entry (not limited to existing values)
New values auto-added to forslagsvarden on form submit
Touch-optimized: minimum 44x44px touch targets
Swedish placeholder text
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This component is used by the elevator wizard and edit form for all category fields.

userStories.title: Elevator wizard shell with step navigation
userStories.description: As an admin in the field, I need the wizard framework with step navigation so that I can fill in elevator data step by step.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin app page /ny with mobile-optimized wizard layout
Built with TanStack Form for form state and validation
9 steps with progress indicator showing current step
Next/Previous navigation between steps
Touch-optimized: minimum 44x44px touch targets, large buttons
Portrait mode optimized, no horizontal scrolling
Organisation selector (admin can assign elevator to any org)
Steps are empty shells at this point — content added in next stories
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Just the wizard framework and navigation. Step content comes in US-021, US-022, US-023.

userStories.title: Wizard steps 1-3: Identifiering, Teknisk spec, Dorrar
userStories.description: As an admin, I need the first three wizard steps filled in with their fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 - Identifiering: hissnummer (validated unique in real-time), adress, hissbeteckning (combobox), distrikt (combobox)
Step 2 - Teknisk specifikation: hisstyp (combobox), fabrikat (combobox), byggar, hastighet, lyfthojd, marklast, antal plan, antal dorrar
Step 3 - Dorrar och korg: typ_dorrar (combobox), genomgang (toggle), kollektiv (combobox), korgstorlek, dagoppning, barbeslag, dorrmaskin
All category fields use the combobox component from US-019
Boolean fields use toggle switches
Besiktningsmanad uses fixed enum (Jan-Dec) if present in these steps
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wizard steps 4-6: Maskineri, Besiktning, Modernisering
userStories.description: As an admin, I need wizard steps 4 through 6 filled in with their fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 4 - Maskineri: drivsystem (combobox), upphangning, maskinplacering (combobox), typ_maskin, typ_styrsystem
Step 5 - Besiktning och underhall: besiktningsorgan (combobox), besiktningsmanad (fixed enum Jan-Dec), skotselforetag (combobox), schaktbelysning
Step 6 - Modernisering: moderniserar, garanti (toggle), rekommenderat_moderniserar, budget_belopp, atgarder_vid_modernisering (combobox)
All category fields use combobox component
Boolean fields use toggle switches
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wizard steps 7-9: Nodtelefon, Kommentarer, Granska

acceptanceCriteria: Step 7 - Nodtelefon: har_nodtelefon (toggle), modell, typ, behover_uppgradering (toggle), pris
Step 8 - Kommentarer: fritext textarea
Step 9 - Granska och spara: summary of all entered fields grouped by section, ability to navigate back to any step to correct
'Save' button sends Convex mutation hissar.create
Clear error message if offline: 'Ingen uppkoppling - forsok igen nar du har nat'
On successful save, clear form and show confirmation
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Form persistence with localStorage drafts
userStories.description: As an admin in the field, I need form data auto-saved so that I never lose work.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/form-persistence.ts in admin app: helpers for saving/loading/clearing drafts
Form state auto-saved to localStorage on every field change (debounced ~500ms)
Key format: draft-ny-hiss for new, draft-hiss-{id} for edit
On page load, if draft exists: prompt 'Du har ett sparat utkast. Vill du fortsatta dar du slutade?'
On successful submit: draft cleared from localStorage
Visual indicator 'Utkast sparat' shown after each auto-save
Integrated with the creation wizard (US-020)
Use /ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidance before implementing UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Pure localStorage — no Service Worker, no IndexedDB, no sync queue.

userStories.title: Excel parser for Hissar sheet with compound fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I need parsing logic for the main elevator sheet in Excel imports.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/utils/ contains Excel import helpers
Reads column headers from row 2 in 'Hissar' sheet
Validates mandatory columns (C, J, L, AB)
Parses compound fields: marklast ('500*6'), antal plan/dorrar ('10*10'), korgstorlek ('1000*2050*2300'), dagoppning ('900*2000')
Parses nodtelefon status from compound cell
Parses byggar (handles 'Okant')
Parses moderniserar (handles 'Ej ombyggd', suffixes like '2007-vinga')
Returns structured elevator objects ready for Convex mutation
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use a library like xlsx or exceljs for parsing. Verify latest version.

userStories.title: Excel parser for Nodtelefoner and Rivna hissar sheets
userStories.description: As a developer, I need parsing for the additional Excel sheets and sheet joining logic.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Nodtelefoner' sheet parsed and joined via hissnummer (column G)
'Rivna hissar' sheet parsed: same structure minus column AH (one column offset), status set to 'rivd', no column headers
Validates file contains expected sheets ('Hissar' required, 'Nodtelefoner' and 'Rivna hissar' optional)
Case-insensitive district matching during join
Returns combined results with sheet source metadata
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automated build and deploy pipelines.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ with CI/CD pipeline
On push to main: typecheck all packages, build all apps
Deploy to Cloudflare Workers via Wrangler
